basic_details.job_title: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Peon, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Sports Coordinator, Kabaddi Instructor, Cricket Instructor, Kayaking Instructor, Physiotherapist, Superintendent (Girls), Peon, Cook
basic_details.short_information: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 11 Sports Coordinator, Kabaddi Instructor, Cricket Instructor, Kayaking Instructor, Physiotherapist, Superintendent (Girls), Peon, Cook Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Chhattisgarh government rules for reserved categories and local women. Maximum age 45 years for SC/ST women including all relaxations. For Sports Coordinator: 35-50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication, NIS Diploma and MPED, Bachelor of Physiotherapy, Graduate with Data Entry Diploma, 12th Pass
qualification.details: Sports Coordinator: Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication from a recognized university. Preference for experience in sports journalism in media institutions, sports federations, academies or sports departments. Kabaddi Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Cricket Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Kayaking Instructor: NIS or equivalent one-year full-time NIS diploma and MPED from a recognized institution. International players given preference. Physiotherapist: Bachelor of Physiotherapy from a recognized university, UGC recognized Physiotherapy degree, state license, physically fit. Superintendent (Girls): Graduate from a recognized university. One-year diploma/certificate in Data Entry Operator/Programming from a recognized institution. Computer test will be conducted. Peon (Collector rate): Passed 12th class. Proficient in office work. Preference to experienced candidates. Cook (Collector rate): Passed 12th class. Proficient in office work. Skilled in cooking. Physical test will be conducted. Preference to experienced candidates.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Skill Test (for Peon and Cook posts)
